title: Parkio Daily: April 27, 2026
teaser: Disney Week of Wishes begins with reimagined Wish Lounge rededication at Magic Kingdom. Plus new Disneyland tech and Yak & Yeti menu updates.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Operating normally during Disney Week of Wishes

breaking.title: Magic Kingdom Rededicates Reimagined Wish Lounge for Make-A-Wish Families
breaking.body: Walt Disney World rededicated the newly refreshed Wish Lounge at Magic Kingdom today as part of Disney Week of Wishes. Six-year-old Paxton, a Make-A-Wish recipient, joined Disney executives and former wish kid Abigail, now a cast member, for the ceremony. The lounge features new artwork and design details inspired by wish-granting moments from Disney stories.

bignews.title: Disney Week of Wishes Kicks Off Across Disney Experiences
bignews.body: Disney and Make-A-Wish are celebrating Disney Week of Wishes, honoring the more than 175,000 life-changing wishes granted over 45 years since the first official wish at Disneyland. A Disney wish is now granted every hour of every day. Walt Disney World grants more than 7,000 wishes each year at the resort.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Collection Launches Ahead of June Release
bignews.body: New Toy Story 5 products are now available featuring Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie and new characters like Lilypad and Smarty Pants. The merchandise showcases the film's 'toy meet tech' theme with new tech features. Toy Story 5 arrives in theaters June 19.

topstories.title: New Tech Launches at Disneyland Entrance
topstories.body: Disneyland has introduced new technology at the park entrance, according to recent guest reports. Details about the specific technology improvements are being shared by visitors experiencing the updates firsthand.

topstories.title: Yak & Yeti Debuts New Menu at Animal Kingdom
topstories.body: Yak & Yeti restaurant at Disney's Animal Kingdom has rolled out a new menu with updated offerings. The Asian-inspired restaurant continues to serve guests in the Asia section of the park.

topstories.title: Former Wish Kid Now Creates Magic as Cast Member
topstories.body: Abigail, who visited Walt Disney World as a Make-A-Wish recipient over a decade ago, now works on the entertainment team helping families meet their favorite characters. She participates in granting approximately 7,000 wishes annually at the resort, calling it a full-circle moment.

icymi.title: Disney Springs Restaurant Face-Off: Boathouse vs. Paddlefish
icymi.body: Guests are comparing two signature Disney Springs waterfront dining locations to determine which restaurant offers the better experience. Both The Boathouse and Paddlefish offer unique dining atmospheres and menus.

spotlight.title: Experience the Magic of a Disney Wish
spotlight.body: The reimagined Wish Lounge at Magic Kingdom provides Make-A-Wish families with a quiet, welcoming retreat during their visit. The space features thoughtful design details and artwork inspired by wish-granting moments from beloved Disney stories, offering families comfort, hope, and joy throughout their magical day.

videos.summary: Paging Mr. Morrow covers the latest food offerings, park updates, and ongoing construction projects at Universal Orlando Resort in 2026.
